description: Population frequency summary: class counts, inverted-allele frequency, HWE test, family linkage status. Gated by SUPPORTED validation because the numbers are only meaningful if the group assignments are trustworthy. Distinct from internal_dynamics — this block is about the POPULATION, that block is about WITHIN-sample mosaicism.
question: Q6

freq_inv.description: Inverted-allele frequency = (2*n_HOM_INV + n_HET) / (2*n_total). Recombinants excluded from denominator; they are neither HOM_REF nor HOM_INV alleles in the strict sense.

expected_counts_hwe.description: Expected HOM_REF / HET / HOM_INV under HWE at observed freq_inv

hwe_verdict.description: underpowered when n_total < 30 or any expected cell < 5

genotype_balance.description: classification axis for downstream (mirrors hwe_verdict but without underpowered)

family_linkage.description: from T9 ancestry jackknife in C01f: single_family if one jackknife window accounts for most of the signal

note_on_hatchery_hwe.description: F1 hybrid hatchery samples systematically violate HWE at neutral loci due to population admixture. A het_excess is EXPECTED; het_deficit is the more informative deviation (suggests assortative mating or selection against heterozygotes).
